theses.title: AGQ predicts code churn hotspots better than Sonar (hotspot_ratio)
Complementarity: Sonar A but AGQ below mean-0.5*std exists
theses.evidence: threshold=0.720 (mean=0.757 - 0.5*std=0.037); cases=23 (httpx, requests, urllib3, flask, click, rich, aiohttp, typer, ansible, home-assistant...)

theses.title: AGQ median runtime is lower than SonarQube median runtime
AGQ discriminates quality across heterogeneous repos
